epic.title: GitHub REST API Integration
epic.description: Implement and maintain GitHub REST API integration for milestones, issues, and labels. Handles all CRUD operations with PAT and GitHub App authentication, rate limiting, retry logic, and idempotent execution.

stories.title: Milestones CRUD
stories.description: As a user, I want to create, find, and reuse GitHub milestones so that epics can be tracked as milestones
acceptance_criteria: Find milestone by exact title match across all states
Support targetMilestone to add stories to existing milestone

tasks.title: Implement createMilestone
tasks.description: POST to GitHub API to create milestone with title and description

tasks.title: Implement findMilestoneByTitle
tasks.description: Search milestones by exact title match across open/closed states

tasks.title: Implement milestone reuse in executePlan
tasks.description: When idempotent=true, find existing milestone by title and skip creation

stories.title: Issues CRUD (Stories & Tasks)
stories.description: As a user, I want to create story and task issues with structured bodies, labels, and milestone assignment
acceptance_criteria: Create story issue with description, acceptance criteria, metadata table, and task placeholder
Create task issue with description, target files, and parent story link
Update story body with task checklist after tasks are created
Link tasks as sub-issues to parent stories via GraphQL addSubIssue mutation

tasks.title: Implement buildStoryBody
tasks.description: Construct markdown body with description, AC, metadata table, and task placeholder comment

tasks.title: Implement buildTaskBody
tasks.description: Construct markdown body with description, affected files, metadata, and parent story link

tasks.title: Implement createIssue with labels and milestones
tasks.description: POST to GitHub API with title, body, milestone number, and label array

tasks.title: Implement sub-issue linking via addSubIssue mutation
tasks.description: GraphQL mutation to link task as sub-issue of story with custom headers

tasks.title: Implement updateIssueBody for task checklist injection
tasks.description: PATCH issue body to inject task checklist markdown after all tasks created

stories.title: Labels Management
stories.description: As a user, I want standard agile labels (type, priority, risk) to be automatically created and managed
acceptance_criteria: Define 11 standard labels: type:epic/story/task, priority:LOW/MEDIUM/HIGH/CRITICAL, risk:LOW/MEDIUM/HIGH
Create missing labels automatically during plan execution
Skip label creation if already exists (ignore 422)
Collect and deduplicate custom tags from epic/stories/tasks

tasks.title: Define STANDARD_LABELS constant
tasks.description: Array of 11 standard label objects with name, color, and description

tasks.title: Implement ensureLabelExists
tasks.description: POST label to GitHub API, ignore 409/422 if already exists

tasks.title: Implement collectRequiredLabels with dedup
tasks.description: Build unique set of labels from STANDARD_LABELS + custom tags, with skipMetadata option for label-only mode

stories.title: Plan Execution Engine
stories.description: As a user, I want the full plan execution pipeline with dry-run, idempotent mode, and proper error handling
acceptance_criteria: Execute full pipeline: create labels → create milestone → create stories → create tasks → link sub-issues → update story bodies
Dry-run mode generates detailed markdown report without any API calls
Idempotent mode reuses existing milestones/stories/tasks by exact title match
Collect all created/reused items with nodeId for downstream Project V2 sync
Handle GitHub API errors gracefully with retry logic and exponential backoff

tasks.title: Implement executePlan pipeline
tasks.description: Orchestrate label creation, milestone creation, story/task creation, sub-issue linking, and body updates in correct order

tasks.title: Implement generateDryRunReport
tasks.description: Generate comprehensive markdown report with milestone, labels, stories, and tasks without API calls

tasks.title: Implement idempotent story/task reuse
tasks.description: Before creating each story/task, search by exact title within milestone and reuse if found

tasks.title: Build ApplyPlanResult with created/reused item tracking
tasks.description: Return structured result with milestoneUrl, createdStories, createdTasks, reusedStories, reusedTasks with nodeId for downstream sync
